title: MacOS is released
subtitle: Operating System
fact: macOS is a proprietary Unix operating system, derived from OPENSTEP for Mach and FreeBSD, which has been marketed and developed by Apple since 2001.

title: IOS is released
subtitle: Operating System
fact: iOS is a mobile operating system created and developed by Apple for its iPhone line of smartphones.

title: Windows 7 is released
subtitle: Operating System
fact: Windows 7 is a major release of the Windows NT operating system developed by Microsoft.

title: TempleOS is released
subtitle: Operating System
fact: TempleOS is a biblical-themed lightweight operating system (OS) designed to be the Third Temple from the Hebrew Bible.
